name: Skippidy Skip
subtitle: First stone to the flag wins
metaDescription: Find a rock, grind it flat, paint it, then skip it across a lake full of rivals, boats, islands and ducks. First stone to the flag wins.
description: Skippidy Skip is a chaotic online rock-skipping race. Find a stone on the beach, grind it flat, hand-paint it, then drag back and let it fly — flat, fast throws chain hop after hop across the lake. Chain five and your rock catches fire. Splash-lob rivals under the water and they have to fish their stone back while you pull ahead. Ferry across on boats, bank shots off hulls, and thread the giant rock spires guarding the flag. 2–8 players, ~3 minute matches. First stone inside the flag ring takes the hole; most holes wins.
whatsNew: First release! Grind a flat one, chain your hops, and race friends to the flag. More lakes and hazards on the way.

screenshots.alt: Skippidy Skip — race across the lake to the flag
Chain five hops and your rock catches fire
Hand-paint your stone before the race

reviews.author: Theo L.
reviews.title: One more throw
reviews.body: The little plink when a skip chains is so satisfying. Splash-lobbed my mate under the water and never looked back.

reviews.author: Ravn N.
reviews.title: Chaotic in the best way
reviews.body: Bank shots off the boats shouldn't be this fun. Want more lakes!
